title: The Times They Are a-Changin'
why_this_song: The Times They Are a-Changin' by Bob Dylan (1964) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 5 times; first heard in: "For the times, they are a-changin'"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "For the times, they are a-changin'"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "And don't speak too soon for the wheel's still in spin"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "For the loser now will be later to win"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "'Cause the times, they are a-changin'"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Come senators, congressmen, please heed the call
Don't stand in the doorway, don't block up the hall
For he that gets hurt will be he who has stalled
For the times, they are a-changin'
Come writers and critics who prophesize with your pen
And keep your eyes wide, the chance won't come again
And don't speak too soon for the wheel's still in spin

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "times" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "times" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "changin'" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "changin'" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Come gather 'round people wherever you roam
Come senators, congressmen, please heed the call
Your old road is rapidly aging

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: If your time to you is worth savin'
Come mothers and fathers throughout the land
The slowest now will later be fast

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "The Times They Are a-Changin'", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "The Times They Are a-Changin'", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "The Times They Are a-Changin'" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "The Times They Are a-Changin'" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "The Times They Are a-Changin'" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "The Times They Are a-Changin'", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
